executive_summary: Build workflow execution failed due to missing workflow configuration file. The GitHub Actions workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' was not found in the repository, preventing any build from being executed. This is a critical configuration error that must be resolved before any Maven build can proceed.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 error when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' does not exist in the repository at the specified branch.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The required GitHub Actions workflow configuration file is missing from the repository. This file defines the CI/CD pipeline for building the Maven project.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No Maven builds can be executed until the workflow file is created and properly configured. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: Workflow Dispatch API Endpoint Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Actions API endpoint for workflow dispatch returned a 404 status code, indicating the workflow cannot be triggered programmatically.
errors.root_cause: The workflow file path '.github/workflows/build.yml' does not exist in the repository, causing the API to return 404 when attempting to dispatch the workflow.
errors.impact: Automated build triggers are non-functional. Manual and automated CI/CD processes cannot initiate builds, preventing continuous integration and deployment workflows.

errors.title: Missing CI/CD Pipeline Configuration
errors.description: The repository lacks the essential GitHub Actions workflow configuration required for Maven build automation. This prevents any automated build, test, or deployment processes from executing.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The .github/workflows directory either does not exist or does not contain the required build.yml workflow file. This is a fundamental CI/CD setup issue.
errors.impact: No automated builds possible. Development team cannot leverage CI/CD automation for quality assurance, testing, or deployment. Manual build processes required until configuration is restored.

recommended_fixes.title: Create GitHub Actions Workflow File
recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file with proper Maven build configuration.
recommended_fixes.automated_solution: Generate and commit a standard Maven build workflow file with compile, test, and package phases.
manual_steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory if it doesn't exist
2. Create build.yml file with Maven build steps
3. Configure Java version and Maven settings
4. Add workflow_dispatch trigger for manual builds
5. Commit and push the workflow file to the repository
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Ensure workflow follows organizational CI/CD standards and security policies. Review required approvals for workflow changes.

recommended_fixes.title: Verify GitHub Actions Permissions
recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub token has proper permissions to access and trigger workflows.
recommended_fixes.automated_solution: Validate token permissions via GitHub API and update if necessary.
manual_steps: 1. Check GitHub token scopes include 'workflow' permission
2. Verify repository Actions are enabled in settings
3. Confirm user/token has write access to repository
4. Test workflow dispatch with updated permissions
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Token permissions must follow least-privilege principle. Document permission changes in audit log.

recommended_fixes.title: Implement Workflow Validation
recommended_fixes.description: Add pre-flight checks to verify workflow file exists before attempting dispatch.
recommended_fixes.automated_solution: Implement workflow file existence check before triggering builds.
manual_steps: 1. Add API call to check workflow file existence
2. Implement graceful error handling for missing workflows
3. Add logging for workflow validation failures
4. Create alerts for missing workflow configurations
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Validation checks should be logged for audit purposes. Failed validations should trigger alerts to DevOps team.

audit_log.analysis_method: Automated log parsing and error classification
audit_log.review_reason: Critical configuration error blocking all builds. Manual intervention required to create workflow file.
audit_log.compliance_notes: Repository lacks required CI/CD automation configuration. Does not meet organizational standards for automated build pipelines.
